content.full_text:
LAW OFFICES

SCHROEDER, DAVIS & ORLISS INC.
A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION

G. GERVAISE DAVIS III
GEORGE L. SCHROEDER
TED ORLISS
JOHN D. LAUGHTON
ROBERT T. DAUNT
F. DAVID LARIVIERE
ANDREW M. SISOLAK
SCOTT DAVID SCHROEDER
LESLIE G. MURRAY

PROFESSIONAL BUILDING
215 W. FRANKLIN STREET, 4TH FLOOR
POST OFFICE BOX 3080
MONTEREY, CALIFORNIA 93942

MONTEREY TELEPHONE (408) 649-1122
SAN JOSE TELEPHONE (408) 441-1122

FAX (408) 649-0566

March 6, 1990

Ms. Katherine Donovan
General Counsel
Fair Practices Commission
428 "J" Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Donovan:

I would like to know if a lobbyist is prohibited from receiving a commission based on obtaining a contract from a state agency. The company employing the lobbyist is seeking contracts to perform medical billing services for the state agency.

Thank you for any help you can give me on this issue.

Sincerely,

SCHROEDER, DAVIS & ORLISS INC.

[signature]
Gary Shallcross
Law Clerk

GS:pte

*ADMITTED IDAHO STATE BAR, REGISTERED USPTO
